title: hydrocotyle novae-zeelandiae var. involucrata
intro: Hydrocotyle novae-zeelandiae var. involucrata, also known as New Zealand pennywort, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe wounds, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Hydrocotyle novae-zeelandiae var. involucrata is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal benefits, although its exact herbal preparations may vary depending on the region and intended use.
